title: Verify Analytics Events for Key User Actions
description: Tests that critical analytics events are fired with the correct attributes at each stage of the Trial Corner flow.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the 'Trial Corner' cohort.
QA has access to an analytics debugging tool.

steps.description: 1. View the homepage widget. Verify 'trial-corner-widget-viewed' fires.
2. Click the homepage widget. Verify 'trial-corner-widget-clicked' fires.
3. On the Trial Corner hub, scroll to the trending section. Verify 'trial-corner-trending-viewed' fires.
4. Click a trending content item. Verify 'trial-corner-trending-clicked' fires with the content ID.
6. On the pop-up, click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'. Verify 'cancel-clicked' fires with page source 'cancel pop-up'.

expected_result: All specified events are tracked correctly with the appropriate attributes, allowing for accurate measurement of the feature's success metrics.
